women_count.description: Total number of women in the set from which the committee is chosen.

men_count.description: Total number of men in the set from which the committee is chosen.

committee_size.description: Required size of the committee (4 people, two of each sex).

women_on_committee.description: Number of women required on the committee.

men_on_committee.description: Number of men required on the committee.

constraint_Mr_Mrs_Good.value: Mr. and Mrs. Good cannot both be on the committee
constraint_Mr_Mrs_Good.description: Constraint that the married couple (one from women, one from men) cannot both serve on the committee simultaneously.
